target:
CASE_ROOT="/cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
ASSETS="dc01 rd01"
python3 - "$CASE_ROOT/context/case_context.md" "$CASE_ID" $ASSETS <<'PY'
import sys, re
ctx, case_id, *assets = sys.argv[1:]

def asset_row(a):
    return f"| `{a}` | {{hostname}} | {{role}} |"

def source_rows(a):
    return [
        f"| `{a}-disk01` | `{a}` | `disk` | `/cases/{case_id}/sources/{a}/{{hostname}}.E01` |",
        f"| `{a}-memory01` | `{a}` | `memory` | `/cases/{case_id}/sources/{a}/{{hostname}}.img` |",
    ]

ph = re.compile(r'^\|\s*`\{asset_id\}')
lines = open(ctx).read().splitlines()
out, section, seeded = [], None, set()
for ln in lines:
    s = ln.strip()
    if   s == '## Asset Inventory':   section = 'asset'
    elif s == '## Sources Inventory': section = 'sources'
    elif s.startswith('## '):         section = None
    if section in ('asset', 'sources') and ph.match(ln):
        if section not in seeded:
            if section == 'asset': out.extend(asset_row(a) for a in assets)
            else:                  out.extend(r for a in assets for r in source_rows(a))
            seeded.add(section)
        continue
    out.append(ln)
open(ctx, "w").write("\n".join(out) + "\n")
print("Seeded Asset + Sources Inventory for:", " ".join(assets))
PY

    [[ -f "$IMG" ]] || continue
    [[ -r "$IMG" ]] || { echo "[$ASSET] NOT READABLE: $IMG"; continue; }

    case "$FB" in

          echo "[$ASSET] raw disk: $(basename "$IMG")"
        else
          echo "[$ASSET] not a disk (memory/container/other): $(basename "$IMG") — $FB"
        fi ;;
    esac
  done
done

echo "=== Tasks ==="

echo "=== SRUM ==="

echo "=== tool vars ==="

#!/opt/pyhindsight/bin/python3

"""Hindsight - Internet history forensics for Google Chrome/Chromium.

This script parses the files in the Chrome data folder, runs various plugins
against the data, and then outputs the results in a spreadsheet.
"""

import argparse
import datetime
import importlib
import logging
import os
import re
import shutil
import sys
import time

import pyhindsight
import pyhindsight.plugins
from pyhindsight.analysis import AnalysisSession
from pyhindsight.utils import get_rich_banner

import rich.align
import rich.console

source ~/.claude/tools.env

' > /tmp/dc01-jl2.log 2>&1
echo "rc=$?"; tail -3 /tmp/dc01-jl2.log
grep '|jumplists|' ./audit/dc01/parse_state.txt
ls -la export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/jumplists/ 2>/dev/null

target:
cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"
source ~/.claude/tools.env
source ./tmp/parse_helpers.sh
M="./sources/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive"
USERSDIR="$(find "$M" -ipath '*/Users' -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
OUT="$CASE_ROOT/export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/browser"
PFX="rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive"

printf '%s | %s | %s\n' "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "dfir-browser" "rd01: Hindsight v2026.04 supports only -b Chrome and -f sqlite/jsonl/xlsx (no csv, no Firefox); ran Hindsight jsonl via venv python on Chrome profiles (spsql,tdungan); Firefox tdungan handled via SQLECmd fallback" >> ./audit/decisions.log

run_artifact rd01 mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive browser \
  bash -c '
    USERSDIR="'"$USERSDIR"'"; OUT="'"$OUT"'"; PFX="'"$PFX"'"
    HS="'"$HINDSIGHT"'"
    mkdir -p "$OUT"
    find "$USERSDIR" \
      \( -ipath "*/Chrome/User Data/Default" \
         -o -ipath "*/Chrome/User Data/Profile *" \
         -o -ipath "*/Edge/User Data/Default" \
         -o -ipath "*/Edge/User Data/Profile *" \) \
      -type d 2>/dev/null | \
    while IFS= read -r profile; do
      label="$(echo "$profile" | sed "s|.*/Users/||; s|/AppData.*Data/||; s| |_|g; s|/|_|g")"
      /opt/pyhindsight/bin/python "$HS" \
        -i "$profile" \
        -o "$OUT/$PFX-${label}-hindsight" \
        -f jsonl \
        -t UTC
      echo "exit=$? profile=$profile"
    done
  ' >/dev/null 2>/tmp/hindsight.log
echo "browser(chrome) run_artifact: $?"
grep -iE 'exit=|error|fail' /tmp/hindsight.log | head -10
echo "=== outputs ==="; ls -la "$OUT" 2>/dev/null
echo "=== state ==="; tail -1 ./audit/rd01/parse_state.txt

OUT="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/webcache"
mkdir -p "$OUT"
rc_any=1
find "$SRC/Users" -iname "WebCacheV01.dat" 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r wc; do
  user="$(echo "$wc" | sed "s|.*/Users/||; s|/AppData.*||")"
  udir="$OUT/$user"
  mkdir -p "$udir"
  # esedbexport writes a <name>.export/ dir of TSV tables next to target; force into udir via -t
  esedbexport -t "$udir/WebCacheV01" "$wc" 2>"$udir/esedbexport.stderr" || echo "esedbexport failed for $user"
done
# success if any table file was produced
n=$(find "$OUT" -type f ! -name "*.stderr" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "webcache table files produced: $n"
[ "$n" -gt 0 ] && exit 0 || exit 1
' > /tmp/dc01-webcache.log 2>&1

cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"
source ~/.claude/tools.env
source ./tmp/parse_helpers.sh
M="./sources/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive"
USERSDIR="$(find "$M" -ipath '*/Users' -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
OUT="$CASE_ROOT/export/rd01/mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive/browser"
PFX="rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive"
# remove empty sqlecmd subdir
rmdir "$OUT/tdungan-firefox-sqlecmd" 2>/dev/null

# sqlite3 last-resort: Firefox history + downloads. Copy DB to tmp (read-only mount safe), query.
run_artifact rd01 mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive browser \
  bash -c '
    USERSDIR="'"$USERSDIR"'"; OUT="'"$OUT"'"; PFX="'"$PFX"'"; CR="'"$CASE_ROOT"'"
    mkdir -p "$OUT" "$CR/tmp/ffsqlite"
    find "$USERSDIR" -ipath "*/Firefox/Profiles/*/places.sqlite" 2>/dev/null | sort -u | \
    while IFS= read -r db; do
      label=$(echo "$db" | sed "s|.*/Users/||; s|/AppData.*Profiles/|-firefox-|; s|/places.sqlite||; s| |_|g; s|/|_|g")
      # copy to tmp to avoid lock issues on the live db
      cp "$db" "$CR/tmp/ffsqlite/places.sqlite"
      # history
      sqlite3 "$CR/tmp/ffsqlite/places.sqlite" \
        "SELECT datetime(v.visit_date/1000000,\"unixepoch\",\"utc\"), p.url, p.title, p.visit_count
         FROM moz_historyvisits v JOIN moz_places p ON v.place_id=p.id
         ORDER BY v.visit_date DESC LIMIT 100000;" \
        > "$OUT/$PFX-${label}-history-sqlite3.csv" 2>/dev/null
      # downloads (annotations)
      sqlite3 "$CR/tmp/ffsqlite/places.sqlite" \
        "SELECT datetime(a.dateAdded/1000000,\"unixepoch\",\"utc\"), p.url, a.content
         FROM moz_annos a JOIN moz_places p ON a.place_id=p.id
         ORDER BY a.dateAdded DESC LIMIT 100000;" \
        > "$OUT/$PFX-${label}-downloads-sqlite3.csv" 2>/dev/null
      echo "label=$label hist_rows=$(wc -l < "$OUT/$PFX-${label}-history-sqlite3.csv")"
    done
  ' >/dev/null 2>/tmp/ffsqlite.log
echo "firefox sqlite3 run_artifact: $?"
cat /tmp/ffsqlite.log | grep -v Updating
echo "=== outputs ==="; find "$OUT" -type f | sed 's|.*/browser/||'
echo "=== rows ==="; for f in "$OUT"/*firefox*.csv; do [ -f "$f" ] && echo "$(wc -l <"$f") $(basename "$f")"; done
echo "=== state ==="; tail -1 ./audit/rd01/parse_state.txt

target:
cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"
source ~/.claude/tools.env
source ./tmp/parse_helpers.sh
ASSET=dc01; SD=mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive
SRC="./sources/$ASSET/$SD"
USERSDIR="$(find "$SRC" -ipath '*/Users' -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1)"

# Re-run run_artifact 'registry' wrapping NTUSER parse (with lowercase-LOG staging).
# run_artifact drops the old registry state line and recounts ALL files in registry/ (machine CSVs already present),
# so the final OK count includes machine + ntuser outputs. Machine files are 444 but run_artifact chmod u+w's first.
run_artifact "$ASSET" "$SD" registry env USERSDIR="$USERSDIR" EZRECMD="$EZRECMD" BATCH="$EZRECMD_BATCH" CASE_ROOT="$CASE_ROOT" bash -c '
OUT="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/registry"
mkdir -p "$OUT"
find "$USERSDIR" -iname "NTUSER.DAT" -not -ipath "*/AppData/*" 2>/dev/null | while read -r HIVE; do
  USER=$(echo "$HIVE" | awk -F/ "{print \$(NF-1)}")
  _hivedir="$(dirname "$HIVE")"
  HIVE_PATH="$HIVE"
  _needs_stage=0
  for _suf in .LOG1 .LOG2; do
    _actual="$(find "$_hivedir" -maxdepth 1 -iname "NTUSER.DAT${_suf}" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
    [ -n "$_actual" ] && [ "$(basename "$_actual")" != "NTUSER.DAT${_suf}" ] && { _needs_stage=1; break; }
  done
  if [ "$_needs_stage" -eq 1 ]; then
    _ustage="./tmp/registry-hives/$USER"
    mkdir -p "$_ustage"
    cp "$HIVE" "$_ustage/NTUSER.DAT"
    for _suf in .LOG1 .LOG2; do
      _log="$(find "$_hivedir" -maxdepth 1 -iname "NTUSER.DAT${_suf}" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
      [ -n "$_log" ] && cp "$_log" "$_ustage/NTUSER.DAT${_suf}"
    done
    HIVE_PATH="$_ustage/NTUSER.DAT"
    printf "%s | dfir-registry | LOG casing mismatch — %s NTUSER.DAT staged to %s\n" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "$USER" "$_ustage" >> ./audit/decisions.log
  fi
  $EZRECMD -f "$HIVE_PATH" --bn "$BATCH" --csv "$OUT/" --csvf "dc01-mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive-${USER}-ntuser-recmd.csv"
done
echo "ntuser parse complete"
' > /tmp/dc01-reg-ntuser.log 2>&1
echo "rc=$?"; tail -8 /tmp/dc01-reg-ntuser.log
grep '|registry|' ./audit/dc01/parse_state.txt
echo "ntuser CSVs:"; ls export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/registry/*ntuser* 2>/dev/null

run_artifact rd01 mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive registry \
  bash -c '
    USERSDIR="'"$USERSDIR"'"; OUT="'"$OUT"'"; CR="'"$CASE_ROOT"'"
    EZRECMD="'"$EZRECMD"'"; BATCH="'"$EZRECMD_BATCH"'"
    find "$USERSDIR" -iname "NTUSER.DAT" -not -ipath "*/AppData/*" 2>/dev/null | while read -r HIVE; do
      USER=$(echo "$HIVE" | awk -F/ "{print \$(NF-1)}")
      _hivedir="$(dirname "$HIVE")"
      HIVE_PATH="$HIVE"
      _needs_stage=0
      for _suf in .LOG1 .LOG2; do
        _actual="$(find "$_hivedir" -maxdepth 1 -iname "NTUSER.DAT${_suf}" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
        [ -n "$_actual" ] && [ "$(basename "$_actual")" != "NTUSER.DAT${_suf}" ] && { _needs_stage=1; break; }
      done
      if [ "$_needs_stage" -eq 1 ]; then
        _ustage="$CR/tmp/registry-hives/$USER"; mkdir -p "$_ustage"
        cp "$HIVE" "$_ustage/NTUSER.DAT"
        for _suf in .LOG1 .LOG2; do
          _log="$(find "$_hivedir" -maxdepth 1 -iname "NTUSER.DAT${_suf}" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
          [ -n "$_log" ] && cp "$_log" "$_ustage/NTUSER.DAT${_suf}"
        done
        HIVE_PATH="$_ustage/NTUSER.DAT"
        printf "%s | dfir-registry | LOG casing mismatch — %s NTUSER.DAT staged to %s\n" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "$USER" "$_ustage" >> "$CR/audit/decisions.log"
      fi
      $EZRECMD -f "$HIVE_PATH" --bn "$BATCH" --csv "$OUT/" --csvf "rd01-mnt-001-base-rd-01-cdrive-${USER}-ntuser-recmd.csv"
      echo "user=$USER exit=$?"
    done
  ' >/dev/null 2>/tmp/recmd_users.log

target:
cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
export CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"
source ~/.claude/tools.env
source ./tmp/parse_helpers.sh
ASSET=dc01; SD=mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive
SRC="./sources/$ASSET/$SD"
USERSDIR="$(find "$SRC" -ipath '*/Users' -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1)"

# Shellbags: per-user. NTUSER LOGs are lowercase -> SBECmd may hit dirty hive. Use staging fallback per profile.
run_artifact "$ASSET" "$SD" shellbags env USERSDIR="$USERSDIR" EZSBECMD="$EZSBECMD" bash -c '
find "$USERSDIR" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r userdir; do
  username=$(basename "$userdir")
  outdir="export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/shellbags/$username"
  mkdir -p "$outdir"
  # Stage hive + logs (casing-aware) to dodge dirty-hive / lowercase-LOG aborts
  stagebase="./tmp/shellbag-hives/$username"
  sd_nt="$stagebase/ntuser"; mkdir -p "$sd_nt"
  _nt="$(find "$userdir" -maxdepth 1 -iname "NTUSER.DAT" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
  [ -n "$_nt" ] && cp "$_nt" "$sd_nt/NTUSER.DAT"
  for s in LOG1 LOG2; do _l="$(find "$userdir" -maxdepth 1 -iname "NTUSER.DAT.$s" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; [ -n "$_l" ] && cp "$_l" "$sd_nt/NTUSER.DAT.$s"; done
  ucdir="$(find "$userdir" -ipath "*/AppData/Local/Microsoft/Windows" -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
  sd_uc="$stagebase/usrclass/Microsoft/Windows"; mkdir -p "$sd_uc"
  if [ -n "$ucdir" ]; then
    _uc="$(find "$ucdir" -maxdepth 1 -iname "UsrClass.dat" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
    [ -n "$_uc" ] && cp "$_uc" "$sd_uc/UsrClass.dat"
    for s in LOG1 LOG2; do _l="$(find "$ucdir" -maxdepth 1 -iname "UsrClass.dat.$s" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)"; [ -n "$_l" ] && cp "$_l" "$sd_uc/UsrClass.dat.$s"; done
  fi
  # parse staged copies (covers both NTUSER + UsrClass)
  $EZSBECMD -d "$stagebase/" --csv "$outdir" 2>&1 | tail -2
  printf "%s | dfir-shellbags | %s staged to %s for LOG replay\n" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "$username" "$stagebase" >> ./audit/decisions.log
done
echo "shellbags done"
' > /tmp/dc01-sbe.log 2>&1
echo "rc=$?"; tail -12 /tmp/dc01-sbe.log
grep '|shellbags|' ./audit/dc01/parse_state.txt
echo "=== output tree ==="
find export/dc01/mnt-001-base-dc-cdrive/shellbags -type f 2>/dev/null

Everything is complete. All 27 evidence tags resolved, 7 findings written, evidence index generated, report finalized.

## Phase-2 analysis complete — dc01 (BASE-DC, domain controller)

**Findings: 7 total — 3 high, 1 medium, 3 low.**

### Key compromise narrative
The domain controller **dc01 (BASE-DC / base-dc.shieldbase.lan, 172.16.4.4, Win Server 2016)** suffered a full **Active Directory credential-database theft** on **2018-09-05**, executed remotely against the DC (it was a lateral-movement *target*, not the origin).

**Actor (account-level only):** `shieldbase\spsql` — a SharePoint SQL **service account** (SID …-1193, created 2018-07-29 by domain-admin `rsydow-a`). It authenticated to dc01 **network-only (Logon Type 3)** from host **172.16.6.11** (also 172.16.6.14).

**Attac
... [2341 bytes omitted] ...
98–99%); one legacy `.job` unparsed.

target:
cd /cases/CLIENT-IR-2026-008
CASE_ROOT="$(pwd)"
CASE_ID="CLIENT-IR-2026-008"
VER_OUT="$CASE_ROOT/analysis/${CASE_ID}-evidence-verification.md"
EVRE='\[EV-[A-Za-z0-9_]+-[0-9]{5}\]'

grep -rhoE "$EVRE" "$CASE_ROOT/analysis/" "$CASE_ROOT/reports/" 2>/dev/null \
  | tr -d '[]' | sort -u > /tmp/ev_cited.txt

python3 - "$CASE_ROOT"/analysis/*-evidence.jsonl > /tmp/ev_registry.tsv 2>/dev/null <<'PY'
import json, sys
for p in sys.argv[1:]:
    try:
        for ln in open(p, encoding="utf-8"):
            ln = ln.strip()
            if ln:
                r = json.loads(ln); print("%s\t%s" % (r["tag"], r["path"]))
    except Exception:
        pass
PY
cut -f1 /tmp/ev_registry.tsv | sort -u > /tmp/ev_defined.txt
cut -f2 /tmp/ev_registry.tsv | sort -u > /tmp/ev_files.txt

while IFS= read -r fpath; do
    [ -n "$fpath" ] && { [[ -f "$CASE_ROOT/$fpath" ]] || printf 'MISSING: %s\n' "$fpath"; }
done < /tmp/ev_files.txt > /tmp/ev_missing.txt

comm -23 /tmp/ev_cited.txt /tmp/ev_defined.txt > /tmp/ev_orphan_cited.txt

# Regenerate each asset Evidence Index from registry
for reg in "$CASE_ROOT"/analysis/${CASE_ID}-*-evidence.jsonl; do
    [ -f "$reg" ] || continue
    a="$(basename "$reg")"; a="${a#${CASE_ID}-}"; a="${a%-evidence.jsonl}"
    report="$CASE_ROOT/analysis/${CASE_ID}-${a}-analysis-report.md"
    [ -f "$report" ] || continue
    python3 - "$reg" "$report" <<'PY'
import json, re, sys
reg, report = sys.argv[1], sys.argv[2]
seen, rows = set(), []
for line in open(reg, encoding="utf-8"):
    line = line.strip()
    if not line: continue
    r = json.loads(line)
    if r["tag"] in seen: continue
    seen.add(r["tag"]); rows.append(r)
rows.sort(key=lambda r: r["tag"])
body = open(report, encoding="utf-8").read()
body = re.split(r'\n##\s+Evidence Index\s*\n', body)[0].rstrip() + "\n"
out = ["\n## Evidence Index\n", "| ID | File | Description |", "|----|------|-------------|"]
for r in rows:
    loc, desc = (r.get("locator") or "").strip(), (r.get("description") or "").strip()
    out.append("| %s | `%s` | %s |" % (r["tag"], r["path"], " — ".join(x for x in (loc, desc) if x)))
open(report, "w", encoding="utf-8").write(body + "\n".join(out) + "\n")
PY
done

# Resolve findings ledgers + list unresolved
python3 - "$CASE_ROOT" > /tmp/ev_unresolved.txt <<'PY'
import json, glob, os, sys
root = sys.argv[1]
reg = {}
for p in glob.glob(os.path.join(root, "analysis", "*-evidence.jsonl")):
    for line in open(p, encoding="utf-8"):
        line = line.strip()
        if not line: continue
        r = json.loads(line)
        reg.setdefault(r["tag"], {"tag": r["tag"], "path": r.get("path"), "locator": r.get("locator", "")})
for led in glob.glob(os.path.join(root, "analysis", "*-findings.jsonl")):
    out = []
    for line in open(led, encoding="utf-8"):
        line = line.strip()
        if not line: continue
        f = json.loads(line)
        seen, ev = set(), []
        for t in list(f.get("provenance", [])) + list(f.get("supporting_artifact_ids", [])):
            if not t.startswith("EV-") or t in seen: continue
            seen.add(t)
            rec = reg.get(t, {"tag": t, "path": None, "locator": "UNRESOLVED"})
            ev.append(rec)
            if rec["path"] is None:
                sys.stdout.write("%s\t%s\t%s\n" % (os.path.basename(led), f.get("id", "?"), t))
        f["evidence"] = ev
        out.append(json.dumps(f, ensure_ascii=False))
    open(led, "w", encoding="utf-8").write("\n".join(out) + ("\n" if out else ""))
PY

VERDICT="PASS"
[[ -s /tmp/ev_missing.txt ]]      && VERDICT="FAIL"
[[ -s /tmp/ev_orphan_cited.txt ]] && VERDICT="FAIL"
[[ -s /tmp/ev_unresolved.txt ]]   && VERDICT="FAIL"

FINDINGS_TOTAL=0; FINDINGS_UNVALIDATED=0
read -r FINDINGS_TOTAL FINDINGS_UNVALIDATED < <(python3 - "$CASE_ROOT"/analysis/*-findings.jsonl <<'PY'
import json, sys
total = unval = 0
for path in sys.argv[1:]:
    try:
        for line in open(path, encoding="utf-8"):
            line = line.strip()
            if not line: continue
            total += 1
            rec = json.loads(line)
            if not (rec.get("human_validated_by") or "").strip(): unval += 1
    except Exception: pass
print(total, unval)
PY
)

{
printf '# Evidence Verification — %s\n\n' "$CASE_ID"
printf 'Generated: %s UTC\n\n' "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
printf '**Verdict: %s**\n\n' "$VERDICT"
printf '| Metric | Count |\n|--------|-------|\n'
printf '| Distinct tags cited | %d |\n' "$(wc -l < /tmp/ev_cited.txt)"
printf '| Registry tags defined | %d |\n' "$(wc -l < /tmp/ev_defined.txt)"
printf '| Missing export files | %d |\n' "$(wc -l < /tmp/ev_missing.txt)"
printf '| Orphan citations (no registry record) | %d |\n' "$(wc -l < /tmp/ev_orphan_cited.txt)"
printf '| Findings citing unresolved evidence | %d |\n' "$(wc -l < /tmp/ev_unresolved.txt)"
printf '| Typed findings (total) | %d |\n' "$FINDINGS_TOTAL"
printf '| Findings awaiting human validation | %d |\n' "$FINDINGS_UNVALIDATED"
[[ "$FINDINGS_UNVALIDATED" -gt 0 ]] && printf '\n> Validation gate: %d of %d findings have an empty `human_validated_by`. A human examiner must validate these independently; AI cannot.\n' "$FINDINGS_UNVALIDATED" "$FINDINGS_TOTAL"
[[ -s /tmp/ev_missing.txt ]] && { printf '\n## Missing Export Files\n\n'; cat /tmp/ev_missing.txt; }
[[ -s /tmp/ev_orphan_cited.txt ]] && { printf '\n## Orphan Citations\n\n'; cat /tmp/ev_orphan_cited.txt; }
[[ -s /tmp/ev_unresolved.txt ]] && { printf '\n## Findings Citing Unresolved Evidence\n\n'; cat /tmp/ev_unresolved.txt; }
} > "$VER_OUT"

echo "VERDICT=$VERDICT"
echo ""
cat "$VER_OUT"
rm -f /tmp/ev_cited.txt /tmp/ev_registry.tsv /tmp/ev_defined.txt /tmp/ev_files.txt /tmp/ev_missing.txt /tmp/ev_orphan_cited.txt /tmp/ev_unresolved.txt
